issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case scenarios for data source connection and validation failures.

scenarios.name: orders-suite-postgres
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the modern fluent datasource API (sources.add_postgres + add_table_asset) and a validator with save_expectation_suite; baseline relies on the legacy from_pandas pattern and skips the Postgres datasource flow entirely.

scenarios.name: pipeline-dataframe-check
scenarios.rationale: Treatment builds a runtime pandas datasource + dataframe asset and runs a checkpoint with add_or_update_checkpoint, checking result.success; baseline uses the deprecated from_pandas/ExpectationSuite.from_json approach without checkpoints.
